steps.title: Treat the repeated expression as a single unit
steps.content:
The factor $(x^2 - x)$ appears in both terms. Treat it like a variable — call it $u$ for clarity:
$$2u + 3u = 5u$$
Substitute back: $$5(x^2 - x)$$

steps.title: Match to the choices
steps.content:
• A: $5x^2 - 5x$ — exactly what we derived. That confirms A is correct.
  • B: $5x^2 + 5x$ — wrong sign on the second term. Eliminated.
  • C: $5x$ — missing the $x^2$ term. Eliminated.
  • D: $5x^2$ — missing the $-5x$ term. Eliminated.
